mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.level, p.salary, p.sort_code, p.status, IFNULL(ec.employee_count, 0) AS employee_count FROM emp_post_level p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_level_id, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM emp GROUP BY post_level_id ) ec ON ec.post_level_id = p.id ORDER BY p.sort_code ASC, p.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.level, p.salary, p.sort_code, p.status, IFNULL(ec.employee_count, 0) AS employee_count FROM emp_post_level p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_level_id, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM emp GROUP BY post_level_id ) ec ON ec.post_level_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp_post_level(name, level, salary, status) VALUES(#{name}, #{level}, #{salary}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp_post_level
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
